note: Mathlib/RingTheory/AlgebraicIndependent/Basic.lean:45 — `Algebra.trdeg R A : Cardinal` is defined as the sup of cardinalities of algebraically independent subsets of A over R, i.e. the transcendence degree; docstring states this explicitly and cites Stacks 030G.
verify_note: decl confirmed in declaration-data.json (kind: def) and at mathlib4 Basic.lean:45; docstring reads verbatim 'The transcendence degree of a commutative algebra A over a commutative ring R is defined to be the maximal cardinality of an R-algebraically independent set in A', @[stacks 030G]; matches catalog Q1387602 label 'transcendence degree' / description 'cardinality of a maximal algebraically independent set of a given field extension' — the R-algebra def specializes to the field-extension case, so 'exact' is honest.
